text:
Doyen's Hair Restorer (長老の毛生え薬) (ちょうろうのけはえぐすり, Chourou no Kewaedusuri) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Card Info

|bgcolor="D6E3FF"|
|-

Chourou no Kewaedusuri
|bgcolor="DAFDDA" align=center|(Elder's Hair Growth Pills) (Hair Growth Formula of the Elder)
|

|align=center colspan="3"|#069
|
|-

|align=center colspan="3"|Rank: B 
Transformation: 30
|
|-
!Card Effect:
|align=center colspan="3"|Luxurious hair will grow wherever it is applied. Use gloves, or hair will grow on fingers and palms. One vial contains 200 ml (Enough to cover ten heads).
|
|-

|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)
|
|}

Summary

Doyen's Hair Restorer 長老の毛生え薬 - This card allows the caster to summon a vial of Doyen's Hair Restorer. When applied to any part of the skin, Luxurious hair will grow. Be sure to use gloves when applying as any contact to skin causes the growth. Each vial contains 200 milliliters, enough to completely cover 10 heads.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.069 :: 長老の毛生え薬 
塗った所がフサフサになる薬。塗る時は手袋を着用すること。でないと手の平や指先にも毛が生えてしまう。１ビン200ml（頭なら10人分）。
|-
![Eng]
|No.069 :: Doyen's Hair Restorer 
Area where you allied the medicine, will grow bushy. The gloves should be worn when using the drug, otherwise your hands and fingers will be affected. (10 head servings) 1 Bottle, 200ml.
|}
